planName: Integration Audit Follow-ups — Manual QA Re-run — 2026-04-26
planSummary: Closeout re-QA after PR #75 (CORS + BusinessHours seed). Verifies (B) admin /organizations smoke unchanged; (C1) dashboard create-booking endpoint accepts bookingType=in_person end-to-end via authenticated proxy (HTTP 201); (C2) website /booking CORS preflight now passes for X-Org-Id; surfaces 1 new bug (website calls non-existent /public/catalog).
runSummary: Re-run on main @ 74e7ea9d after PRs #71/#72/#73/#74/#75. C1 verified end-to-end via authenticated dashboard proxy (POST /dashboard/bookings → 201, bookingType in_person → INDIVIDUAL). C2 CORS verified fixed (preflight passes, X-Org-Id accepted). New bug surfaced: apps/website/app/booking/page.tsx:78 calls /public/catalog but backend route is /public/services — out of scope, escalated.

cases.summary: Admin /organizations renders with no console errors after ApiError widening (PR #73)
cases.text: Re-verified. No regression after PRs #74/#75. Status unchanged from initial run.

cases.summary: Dashboard create-booking accepts bookingType=in_person end-to-end (P0 regression)
cases.text: Verified end-to-end via authenticated dashboard proxy: POST /api/proxy/dashboard/bookings with bookingType: 'in_person' + branchId + clientId + employeeId + serviceId + scheduledAt returned HTTP 201 with body { id, bookingType: 'INDIVIDUAL', status: 'PENDING', price: '12000' }. The @Transform(({ value }) => mapBookingType(value)) absorbs the snake_case alias. Created booking id: a262909c-f817-4004-8cd2-7140339d9c4d.

cases.summary: Website /booking — CORS preflight now accepts X-Org-Id (PR #75)
cases.text: Verified via Chrome DevTools MCP: GET /api/v1/public/employees and GET /api/v1/public/branches both returned 200 with X-Org-Id header sent and access-control-allow-origin: http://localhost:5105 in response. CORS bug from initial QA is closed.

cases.summary: Website /booking — services endpoint path drift (NEW bug)
cases.text: Surfaced when CORS unblocked the call: apps/website/app/booking/page.tsx:78 calls publicFetch('/public/catalog') → /api/v1/public/catalog returns 404 because backend exposes the controller at @Controller('public/services') (apps/backend/src/api/public/catalog.controller.ts:10). Path is wrong — services list never loads. Out of scope for this run; escalated for one-line fix in website.
Skipped (unchanged): seed has only 1 Membership for super-admin.
Skipped (unchanged): no Expo simulator on host.
Skipped (unchanged): no suspended tenant in seed.
